description: Multi-dimension tests combining multiple challenges simultaneously

tests.name: Tool routing + Pattern detection + Edge case
tests.prompt: The user pastes this and asks you to fix it for Claude Code: 'You are a helpful assistant. Think step by step. Help me with my code, make it better, do whatever you think is best. Here's my entire codebase: [50 files]. Find and fix bugs.'
assertions: Converts to Claude Code agentic format
Includes file scope, stop conditions, human review triggers

tests.name: Visual + Token efficiency + Tool routing
tests.prompt: Give me the shortest possible MJ prompt for a neon-lit Tokyo alley at night. Under 30 words. Include negative prompt. Go.

tests.name: Agentic + Multi-domain + Memory
tests.prompt: We're using Next.js 14 with App Router, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Our auth uses NextAuth with GitHub provider. Write a Claude Code prompt to add a billing system with Stripe, including webhook handling, subscription management, and a customer portal. Don't touch the auth module.
assertions: Includes memory block with stack decisions
Has stop conditions and human review triggers

tests.name: Pattern detection + Edge case + Credentials
tests.prompt: Fix this prompt: 'Help me deploy to production using API key sk-live-abc123def456 and database postgres://admin:secret@prod.db.com:5432/app. Just do whatever you think is best. Think step by step.'
assertions: Replaces 'do whatever you think is best' with specific instructions
Notes credentials should be environment variables

tests.name: Ambiguous + Multi-tool + Complexity
tests.prompt: I need to create a product demo video. First generate some concept art with an image AI, then create a video from one of the images, then add voiceover. I don't know which tools to use for each step.
assertions: Recommends tools for each step (MJ/SD for images, Sora/Runway for video, ElevenLabs for voice)
Each prompt uses correct syntax for its recommended tool
Does NOT try to do everything in one prompt
